title: KitchenCraft Food-Safe Cooking String, 6 m (197 ft)
features: This kitchen twine is handy for all sorts of jobs, from tying joints of meat to keep their shape, to securing stuffing in poultry
KitchenCraft's cooking string is made of 1% food-safe rayon. This makes it hygienic and very strong
You get 6 m (197 ft) of string in the pack, so you can use it for every Sunday roast and still have some left over for Christmas dinner!
With its on-card cutter, it's always on-hand and ready to use. You'll find 1,s of uses round the home, from arts and crafts to DIY
description: From the manufacturer The definitive kitchenware brand. KitchenCraft is the definitive kitchenware brand, with more than 1,300 everyday kitchen essentials to help you cook, bake and decorate. KitchenCraft Food-Safe Cooking String (60 m) You'll never want to roast without it No home chef should be without cooking string. It’s a real helping hand for all sorts of tasks, from securing meats for roasting, to tying sausages, to quick DIY jobs. And it’s a must-have for Sunday roasts and Christmas dinner. KitchenCraft’s cooking twine is made of rayon, so it’s 100 per cent food safe, very hygienic, and impressively durable. And best of all, you get a whopping 60 metres of string, so it offers excellent value for money. Measures 60 m (197 feet) Oven safe to 250 degrees Celsius (482 degrees Fahrenheit). Thousands of Uses Secure roasts and stuffing When you’ve stuffed your chicken with a nice home-made sage and onion stuffing, the last thing you want is for it to fall out as it roasts. This kitchen string can be used to truss poultry to secure stuffing, or to tying roast meats to prevent it from ‘spreading’ in the oven. Fasten herbs or slices of bacon to meat Give your roasts some serious seasoning by tying herbs, spices and even bacon to them before cooking. This rayon cooking string is really good for making crispy bacon-basted turkey for Christmas dinner. Great for crafts and DIY This twine is great for cooking, but it’s not just for kitchen use. You can use it for wrapping parcels and making bunting, as well as lots of other crafts projects and quick DIY jobs. Includes a Handy Cutter Cutting lengths of string is really easy. This pack includes a handy on-card cutter. Just leave your string in the pack, and you can pull and cut the length you need, as you need it. This means there’s no chance of the string unfurling, and less chance of it going missing. About KitchenCraft The definitive kitchenware brand. Since 1850, KitchenCraft has designed, manufactured and supplied thousands of cooking utensils, tools and gadgets, each playing an important role in the kitchens of customers across the UK. With more than 1,000 products to choose from, there’s always a KitchenCraft product you can rely on - from essentials for every day to the exceptional.
